reason: Global TianChen-RV MLIR invariants: C++/MLIR stack, unified RISC-V, compute-free tcrv.exec, descriptor-driven computation as migration debt.
Architecture boundary for extension family ops and descriptor non-authority.
RVV plugin typed family/body authority and legacy descriptor mirror constraints.
Default extension family ops to EmitC route and descriptor boundary.
Target artifact export, runtime ABI, selected-plan, and route preflight contract.
Focused lit/FileCheck and build validation expectations for artifact/export behavior.
Predecessor self-check authority work and remaining descriptor-exit seam.
Removed public descriptor compute helpers so RVV descriptors no longer expose default-path C arithmetic/type authority.
Removed i32 descriptor arithmetic-expression helper API from the live public descriptor surface.
Removed descriptor-owned C operator and scalar C type registry fields from bounded RVV binary family metadata.
Removed descriptor-owned scalar and dispatch C operator fields from i32 family registry metadata.
Removed RVV+scalar bridge C operator mirror fields so dispatch compute authority comes from typed family components.
Removed frontend contract scalar C type mirror from finite binary metadata.
Renamed self-check expectation fields to typed arithmetic token and ABI-derived scalar element C type authority.
Rewired direct RVV generated provenance comments and self-check path away from descriptor arithmetic comments.
Derived scalar fallback EmitC helper element C type from IR-backed runtime ABI pointer roles instead of descriptor scalar type metadata.
Derived RVV+scalar dispatch self-check arithmetic from selected typed RVV component family instead of family-name or descriptor mirrors.
Updated direct microkernel e2e validation and evidence vocabulary from descriptor c_operator comments to typed arithmetic_source/arithmetic_token provenance.
